title: LegalCase
description: A civil litigation matter the NYC Law Department handled on behalf of the City. Canonical schema reconciling 'Case-Related Information About Civil Litigation' (pjgc-h7uv). Keyed on docket/index number. NOTE: this is the Law Department's own case index; the authoritative ledger of claims filed and settlement dollars is published separately by the Office of the Comptroller (ex6k-ym48), so payout figures here are the litigation-side view, not the citywide claims record.

plaintiffsPetitionersFirms.description: Plaintiffs / petitioners and their firms ('Plaintiffs/Petitioners Firms').

defendantsRespondentsFirms.description: Defendants / respondents and their firms ('Defendants/Respondents & Firms').

leadBbl.description: Lead property Borough-Block-Lot, where the matter concerns a property ('Lead BBL').

totalCityPayout.description: Total the City paid out on the matter ('Total City Payout AMT').

totalCityReceived.description: Total the City received ('Total City Received AMT').
